instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
How to ensure that your term insurance claim is hassle-free claim settlement?
Meta description: Worried about your term insurance claim being rejected? There are some things you can do to ensure that this may not happen.
Keywords: term insurance plans, term insurance calculator, term insurance claim process
When it comes to protecting your family’s financial future, term insurance plans are easily one of the preferred option available to you. Since your family’s financial situation is dependent on term insurance, getting certain things right is absolutely essential to ensure that they don’t face any roadblocks during the term insurance claim settlement process.
If you’re looking out for ways to ensure that your term insurance claims are not rejected, then you’ve come to the right place. But before we take a look at that, let’s just quickly revisit what term insurance is all about.
About term insurance
Term insurance plans are a type of life insurance policy, where an insurance company agrees to provide a life cover for a certain duration to the policyholder in exchange for periodic premium payments.
Now, if the policyholder faces an untimely death during the duration of the policy, the insurer will pay out a predetermined sum of money, known as the death benefit, to the policyholder’s family. This death benefit can then be used by the family to take care of their expenses and further their life goals.
On the other hand, if the policyholder survives till the end of the policy tenure, no maturity benefits would be paid out. Since there are no maturity benefits, the premium paid towards a term insurance plan tends to be far more affordable than other types of life insurance plans.
How to ensure that your term insurance claim is not rejected?
Okay so, let’s get down to the main part of the article. Here are some ways through which you can ensure that your term insurance claim settlement process goes on smoothly.
Ensure that you disclose your medical history
Non disclosure of material information such as lifestyle habits, existing insurance coverage or medical history including that of the family is one of the leading causes for term insurance claim rejection. Therefore, when you’re filling out the term insurance proposal form, take extra care to disclose all of your pre-existing medical conditions and surgeries that you may have undergone previously. Also, don’t forget to disclose lifestyle habits such as smoking and alcohol consumption.
Provide complete and correct information
Entering incomplete or incorrect information during the term insurance application process can prove to be very costly later on. And so, it is crucial to get all of the information right. Don’t rely on other people to fill out your application form; they may get certain fields wrong or enter incorrect information.
Always make sure that you personally fill all of the details. Here’s a tip. While filling out the application, don’t just focus on entering just the mandatory fields. It is advisable to also fill in the other fields even though they’re not mandatory. This way, you can reduce the chances of insurance claim rejection. And finally, before you submit the application form, just do a quick check to see if you’ve made any mistakes.
Keep your nominee details updated at all times
The death benefit from a term insurance plan is paid out to the nominee of the policyholder. If the insurance company has trouble verifying the nominee under the plan during an insurance claim, it may lead to delays in claim settlement. So, always ensure that you keep your nominee’s details updated. If your current nominee passes away, get in touch with your insurance company to change your nominee immediately.
Ensure that your policy remains active
Generally, insurance service providers offer a grace period over and above the due date for payment of premiums. If you don’t pay your renewal premiums within the grace period, your policy will lapse.
And term insurance claims raised on a lapsed policy will be automatically rejected by the insurer. Therefore, it is extremely important to pay your premiums on time and within the due date. This way you can keep your policy active throughout.
Also, before you purchase a term plan, use a term insurance calculator to know just how much premium you would have to pay. This way, you can plan your finances in a much better manner.
Conclusion
Following the above-mentioned points religiously can make the term insurance claim process go on smoothly. That said, if you haven’t already invested in term insurance plans, do consider availing one. But remember, always use a term insurance calculator to determine the premium that you have to pay before purchasing a term insurance plan.
https://www.canarahsbclife.com/blog/term-insurance/make-sure-that-your-term-insurance-claims-are-never-rejected.html
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
